Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a Python dictionary representing a DECLARE model for a specific product design and launch process scenario

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: First I need to understand the DECLARE model structure as described It is a Python dictionary with specific keys Keys for unary constraints existence absence exactly one init Values are dictionaries where keys are activities and values are dictionaries with support and confidence

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: In pm4py unary constraints use activity names while binary constraints usually have tuple keys of source and target activities

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In pm4py a DECLARE model is typically existence mapped to activity support confidence and response mapped to activity pairs with support confidence

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Activities IG DD TFC CE PC LT UT AG MP FL

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Process flow expected IG happens first DD happens after IG TFC and CE happen after DD PC happens after design is feasible and costs are evaluated LT and UT happen after PC AG happens after testing MP happens after approval FL happens last

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Unary constraints init IG must be the first activity existence all activities must happen at least once absence none exactly one FL maybe AG

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Binary constraints responded existence if IG occurs then DD must occur if DD occurs then TFC and CE must occur if PC occurs then LT and UT must occur if AG occurs then MP and FL must occur if MP occurs then FL must occur

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Coexistence TFC and CE might coexist LT and UT might coexist

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Response IG to DD DD to TFC DD to CE TFC to PC CE to PC PC to LT PC to UT LT to AG UT to AG AG to MP AG to FL MP to FL

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Precedence means A must precede B so tuples like IG DD DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG AG MP AG FL MP FL

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: To avoid redundancy maybe use succession for the main flow and response precedence for additional weaker constraints

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Process graph IG to DD to TFC and CE to PC to LT and UT to AG to MP to FL

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Succession for the strongest direct sequential dependencies IG DD DD TFC DD CE TFC PC CE PC PC LT PC UT LT AG UT AG AG MP MP FL

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Leave alternate and chain constraints empty because immediate or alternate repetition rules are not clearly required by the scenario

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Use negative constraints such as nonsuccession FL IG FL DD AG IG and nonchainsuccession IG FL DD AG to prevent impossible backward or skipped progress

Name: Validation - PE

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The final model includes existence for all ten activities init for IG exactly one for FL and AG responded existence for IG FL and DD PC coexistence for TFC CE and LT UT succession for the main chain and empty dictionaries for unsupported constraint families
